title: Cross-model analysis (placeholder for future models)
description: Framework for comparing state faithfulness across LLM families. The evaluation pipeline is model-agnostic — drop in any model's dialogues and run the same evaluator.

workflow.step_1: Generate dialogues with new model using existing dialogue_generator.py
workflow.step_2: Evaluate with evaluator.py using host.llm (consistent evaluator across models)
workflow.step_3: Compare faithfulness scores across models to assess model-dependence of consistency
workflow.step_4: Check if structured_state prompting provides the same improvement across all models

key_question: Is state faithfulness model-dependent? Does structured_state prompting help universally?
